tagline: Honoring Loved Ones With Care, Respect, and Craftsmanship
heroHeadline: Locally Owned. Family Focused. Crafted With Care.
heroText: At Memorial Monuments of Louisiana, we’re proud to serve our communities with quality monuments, honest service, and a personal touch. From new headstones and memorials to restoration work on existing monuments, we help families honor their loved ones with care, respect, and lasting craftsmanship.
welcomeTitle: Memorial services tailored to each family
welcomeText: We help families design, restore, and care for monuments with the kind of personal attention that matters. Whether you are choosing a new headstone, refreshing an older memorial, or needing on-site engraving, our team is here to make the process clear, respectful, and dependable.
aboutText: Memorial Monuments of Louisiana is locally owned and operated, serving families with dependable care, quality craftsmanship, and honest guidance. From new monuments and headstones to cleaning, releveling, lettering repaint, restoration, and on-site engraving, our goal is to help families choose a lasting tribute that honors their loved one with dignity and respect.

testimonials.name: Local Family
testimonials.text: They were kind, respectful, and easy to work with during a difficult time. The monument turned out beautiful.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Customer
testimonials.text: The restoration work made an older monument look cared for again. Honest people and quality work.

restorationGallery.title: Lettering Restoration
restorationGallery.description: Cleaned and refreshed lettering for a clearer, more respectful finish.

restorationGallery.title: Monument Cleaning
restorationGallery.description: Gentle cleaning to remove years of buildup while preserving the stone.

restorationGallery.title: Releveling Work
restorationGallery.description: Careful reset and leveling work to help restore a monument’s original presence.
